working_on: Cadence-overdue project health check (third audit; window S-0042 → S-0051; cadence 10, overdue by 1).
declared_scope: Conduct third project health-check audit per engine/operations/health-check.md and ADR 0022. Run mechanical scans (engine/tools/health_check.py, engine/tools/scan_orphans.py, archive telemetry across S-0042..S-0051, ADR census, gh issue list, mempalace stats); apply the operative diagnostic question to every surface; surface at least one non-obvious finding not on any scanner's output; triage findings per CLAUDE.md 'Default to fix-in-context' (file as Issues with health-check-finding label only when cross-session deferral is justified). Author the report at docs/health-checks/S-0052.md; bump engine/session/register_state.json last_audit_session field at health_check.py emit time (clears the cadence trigger); update engine/STATE.md last-build-session pointer + next-session work item; update engine/ENGINE_LOG.md [Unreleased]; close out via standard shutdown sequence.
outcome_summary: Third project health check completed. The post-S-0041 cadence-overdue-catchup logic exercised end-to-end and delivered as designed (fired at S-0051, deferred cleanly, re-fired at S-0052 with overdue surface, audit landed, trigger cleared via health_check.py emit-time bump of last_audit_session to S-0052). Three non-obvious findings: (A) routine-mode prerequisites surfaced one-at-a-time across S-0048→S-0051 — Issues #7/#8/#9/#10 closed in succession because routine-mode got no equivalent of the build-readiness gate (filed Issue #12 tech-debt); (B) transcript_token_pct quietly producing impossible >1.0 numbers in 30% of audit-window archives (S-0044=1.11, S-0046=1.62, S-0047=1.70) — Issue #11 fixed inline with output line reframing + CLAUDE.md bullet + shutdown/health-check ops-doc annotations; (C) outcome_summary_soft_warns absent in 5 consecutive archives (S-0043 → S-0047) — the persistent-warn surface cannot detect its own missing input (filed Issue #13 health-check-finding for shutdown-time field-presence audit). Plus inline state correction: STATE.md ADR count drift (51 / 16 engine → 52 / 17 engine; carried pre-S-0045 numbers across 7 STATE.md edits since ADR 0052 landed). 22 dead-weight scanner candidates triaged with explicit dispositions (22 preserve with reasons; 1 sub-action — OQ-BYOK reference inside ADR 0029 sentence-level edit folded into next cleanup-batch). Cadence keep-at-10; re-evaluate at S-0062. validate.py 30 checks (venv mode), 0 hard-fails, 29 soft-warns (25 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C; 4 issue_collision from #1/#2/#12/#13 — the audit's own commit triggered #12 + #13 collisions, expected). Backlog 1 → 2 (closed #11, filed #12 + #13; #1, #2 upstream remain). No HANDOFF entries authored (every audit finding routed via fix-in-context or filed-as-Issue per ADR 0048). No MemPalace pushback/lesson capture this session (MCP tools not loaded; audit report itself is the primary record).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — the approved plan's full scope landed: eager-claim S-0052; mechanical scans (health_check.py, scan_orphans.py, archive telemetry, gh issue list, mempalace stats, ADR census, validate-history.jsonl) all run; audit conducted with three non-obvious findings (A, B, C) the scanners couldn't produce; report authored at docs/health-checks/S-0052.md; Issue #11 fixed in-context (scan_context_telemetry.py output line + CLAUDE.md bullet + ops-doc annotations); STATE.md ADR drift corrected; Issues #12 + #13 filed; STATE.md last-build-session + next-session-work-item updated; ENGINE_LOG.md [Unreleased] populated; cadence trigger cleared (last_audit_session bumped to S-0052). User did not return mid-session for confirmation (the user invoked /start-engine 'begin health check' under Auto mode and let the audit run end-to-end); user_confirmed_changes set false because no explicit mid-session confirmation occurred. The audit's discipline-against-deferral framing held — every finding triaged with explicit disposition; no findings silently carried forward to STATE.md without substantial-scope justification.
